title: hieracium tomentosum subsp. tomentosum
intro: Hieracium tomentosum subsp. tomentosum, also known as Downy Hawkweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin issues, and inflammation due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium tomentosum subsp. tomentosum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce pain, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by making a tincture from its aerial parts.
